channel.title: TeamTango Changelog
channel.description: What we've shipped in TeamTango, the team engagement platform.

item.title: Team Pulse runs on live data
item.description: The dashboard stat cards — kudos sent, posts created, engagements, participation rate — now compute from your team's real activity, with week-over-week trends.

item.title: Events page
item.description: Create team events, RSVP with one tap, and see what's upcoming, happening right now, or already wrapped — complete with attendee lists and live status.

item.title: Comments, plus events and gift funds on the dashboard
item.description: Every wall post now supports threaded comments. The dashboard gained an Upcoming Events widget and a Gift Fund widget with inline contributions.

item.title: Time-off overhaul
item.description: Working-day-aware request calculations, public holidays for 250+ countries with regional support, per-person work schedules and country overrides, half-day requests, and annual leave allowances with live balances.

item.title: People section, rebuilt
item.description: A single searchable directory with multi-select filters for department, team, role, and status — plus bulk actions and inline invitation management.

item.title: New design system
item.description: A cleaner, calmer TeamTango: refreshed typography, softer color palette, redesigned dashboard, stat cards with inline charts, and a reworked reactions row.

item.title: Post editing and celebrations
item.description: Edit or delete your posts after publishing, and a new Celebrate post type with birthday tracking for teammates.

item.title: Workspace invitations and onboarding
item.description: Invite teammates by email and walk new workspaces through a guided setup: departments, teams, and people in minutes.

item.title: Time-off requests
item.description: The first version of time off: request leave, get it approved, and see your team's availability.

item.title: Waitlist opens
item.description: TeamTango development kicks off in earnest and the waitlist goes live at teamtango.io.
